metadata.title: CWA Mechanistic Sub-Experiments: Small-Init (Sub-Exp A) and Shift Ablation (Sub-Exp B)

sub_exp_A.description: Small-init (σ=0.01) does not push J·s̄ above 0.7 (criticality); max J·s̄≈0.41 vs 0.37 for Kaiming.

sub_exp_B.verdict_description: Coupling loss is entirely from mean shift; fixed-point adds no value.

summary.mechanistic_description: Coupling loss is entirely from mean shift; fixed-point adds no value.
